NOTICE TO PLAINTIFF

NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION AND STAY LITIGATION (TRANSACTION ID # 61304605) FILED BY DEFENDANT ARCHDIOCESE OF SAN FRANCISCO MUSCAT, CORRINE HEARING SET FOR NOV-30-2017 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANTS ARCHDIOCESE OF SAN FRANCISCO AND CORRINE MUSCAT'S MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION AND STAY LITIGATION IS CONTINUED TO JANUARY 4, 2018 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 302. SUPPLEMENTAL MOVING PAPERS MAY BE FILED BY 12/11; SUPPLEMENTAL OPPOSITION BY 12/18; SUPPLEMENTAL REPLY BY 12/21. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; CLERK: G. GONZALES; REPORTER: DENISE DOUCETTE, CSR#5963, TEL. 707.246.3323. [302]

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANTS ARCHDIOCESE OF SAN FRANCISCO AND CORRINE MUSCAT'S MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION AND STAY LITIGATION IS GRANTED. DEFENDANTS REPRESENT THAT PLAINTIFF ERNESTO PEREZ IS AGREEABLE TO ARBITRATION OF HIS CLAIMS AGAINST DEFENDANTS. THE CASE IS STAYED PENDING THE CONCLUSION OF THE ARBITRATION PROCEEDINGS. ORDER SIGNED AFTER HEARING. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; CLERK: G. GONZALES; NOT REPORTED.

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Arbitration And Stay Litigation
Off Calendar Jan-04-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance.

RULING: There being no appearance or objection, the Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANTS ARCHDIOCESE OF SAN FRANCISCO and CORRINE MUSCAT'S Motion To Compel Arbitration And Stay Litigation is GRANTED. Defendants represent that plaintiff Ernesto Perez is agreeable to arbitration of his claims against defendants. The case is stayed pending the conclusion of the arbitration proceedings.

ORDER SIGNED after hearing. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: G. Gonzales; Not reported.

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Arbitration And Stay Litigation
Off Calendar Nov-30-2017 Continued To Jan-04-18 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Michelle L. Covington, Esq. of Weintraub Tobin, T:415.772.9615, for defendant/moving party;
Robert G. Jackson, Esq. of the Law Offices of Robert G. Jackson, T:650.757.6422, for plaintiff/opposing party, by Court Call.

RULING: The matter was argued. After arguments, the Court vacates its tentative ruling on DEFENDANTS ARCHDIOCESE OF SAN FRANCISCO and CORRINE MUSCAT's Motion To Compel Arbitration And Stay Litigation and continues the hearing to January 4, 2018 at 9:30 am in Department 302. Supplemental moving papers may be filed by 12/11; supplemental opposition by 12/18; supplemental reply by 12/21. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: G. Gonzales; Reporter: Denise Doucette, CSR#5963, Tel. 707.246.3323.
